title: BowBoost Helper
description: Highlights the perfect bow boost angle by changing your crosshair in real-time.
body:
# 🎯 BowBoost Helper

**BowBoost Helper** is a** lightweight client-side mod** designed to help you consistently hit the **perfect bow boosting angle** in PvP.

Instead of **guessing** your aim, the mod gives you **instant visual feedback when you reach the optimal angle** making your boosts more **accurate,** **faster,** and **reliable.**

## ⚡ Features


### 🔴 Real-Time Angle Detection

- Detects when you’re aiming at the optimal ~45° angle
- Works instantly with no delay


### 🎯 Dynamic Crosshair Feedback

Crosshair changes color when you hit the perfect angle
Helps you time your boost with precision


### 🎨 Custom Crosshair Option

Optional custom crosshair when aligned
Clean, minimal, and PvP-friendly design


### ⚙️ Fully Customizable

- Adjustable angle range
- Custom crosshair colors
- Toggle features on/off


## 🧠 Why Use It?

- Improve bow boosting consistency
- React faster in fights
- Remove guesswork from aiming
- Perfect for PvP, practice, and competitive play


## 🧩 Compatibility

- Client-side only — works on any server
- Compatible with performance mods like Sodium
- Works with Mod Menu for easy configuration


## 📦 Requirements

1. Minecraft: 1.21.x
1. Fabric Loader: 0.16.0+
1. Java: 21+

## Dependencies:

1. Fabric API
1. Cloth Config API
1. Mod Menu
